{"society_power": 7.0, "state_power": 6.5, "society_change": 1.5, "state_change": -1.0, "key_event": "Third Republic founded; Seize Mai defeat entrenches parliamentary supremacy", "reasoning": "The imperial state collapsed at Sedan and was rebuilt as a constrained parliamentary republic, lowering state autonomy despite restored fiscal/administrative capacity; society strengthened markedly through republican electoral victories, the defeat of Mac-Mahon's 1877 power grab, press freedom, and universal male suffrage\u2014though the Commune's bloody repression checked its radical wing."}
